name: Cavemen Tales Collector's Edition
short_description: Help Sam and Crystal and their family to find a new home in this time management strategy game! Explore, guide the tribe, build, gather resources, overcome obstacles and enjoy the tale of family, friendship and courage!
detailed_description:
Step into a vibrant prehistoric world with Cavemen Tales: Prehistoric Adventure. Join Sam and Crystal as they lead their tribe to a new home, navigating through dozens of exciting levels filled with challenges, hidden treasures, and intriguing characters.

In this fun and colorful time management game you will explore, guide the tribe, build, gather resources, overcome obstacles along the way and enjoy the tale of family, friendship and courage!

However, be aware not everyone really has honest intentions. There are people who only strive to power and wealth!

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

This COLLECTOR'S EDITION version contains some special features:

  • Bonus levels with extended story-line

  • Additional achievements

  • Art Gallery

  • Soundtrack

  • Help Sam and Crystal and their family to find a new home

  • Explore the prehistoric era and meet peculiar characters

  • Stop the bad guys from ruining tribe's happiness

  • Dozens of exciting levels to master and hundreds of quests

  • Find hidden treasures and win achievements

  • 3 difficulty modes: relaxed, timed and extreme

  • Step-by-step tutorials for beginners

English*, German, French, Dutch
*languages with full audio support
